fields.summary: Gates staff-only chat bridge and escalation affordances layered on top of the visitor chat runtime.
fields.admin_requirements: Admin and staff surfaces should only render bridge-specific chat widgets when this suite feature is enabled and Pages Chat runtime prerequisites are active.
fields.public_requirements: Does not enable visitor chat by itself; only controls staff bridge behavior once Pages Chat is available.
fields.service_requirements: Relies on the Pages Chat suite feature and deployment socket prerequisites for any live bridge activity.
